subject: Electabuzz — yellow striped bipedal creature with electrical energy swirling around it in a dynamic action pose
description: A muscular yellow bipedal creature with black stripe markings stands in a wide action stance, arms raised and electrical energy visibly crackling and swirling around its body. Its antennae-like horns and large round eyes give it an aggressive, charged expression. The background is a bright golden-yellow wash, amplifying the sense of electrical power. The composition emphasizes motion and energy — the creature's pose and the arcing bolts fill the frame dynamically.
foreground: yellow striped bipedal creature with electric energy swirling around it
background: bright golden-yellow background with electric arcs
